prompt:
Read a CSV file into a Pandas DataFrame, convert numeric values into floats, and draw a line chart of data in the specified columns. In addition, compute the cube-root of the data. The function should output with: tuple(df: pandas.DataFrame, ax: matplotlib.axes.Axes, cube_root: pandas.Series)
df: A pandas DataFrame of the data in the CSV file. 
ax: A matplotlib Axes object showing the plotted data. 
cube_root: A pandas Series containing the cube-root of the data. 
You should write self-contained code starting with:
```
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
def task_func(file_path="data.csv", columns=["A", "B", "C"]):
```
